menuCategories.title: Godavari Ruchulu
menuCategories.tagline: Traditional Godavari-style home cooking — fresh, coastal, and deeply comforting

items.name: Vankaya Endu Nethallu Curry
items.description: A rustic coastal dish where tender brinjals are cooked with flavorful dried anchovies; serves 4-5 members.

items.name: Beerakaya Endu Royyalu
items.description: Ridge gourd sautéed with sun-dried prawns, offering a unique savory seafood blend; serves 4-5 members.

items.name: Gongura Pachi Royyalu
items.description: 1kg of fresh prawns cooked in a tangy, fiery paste made from iconic Andhra Sorrel leaves; serves 4-5 members.

items.name: Bendakaya Pachi Royyalu
items.description: 1kg of fresh prawns combined with okra and seasoned with local Godavari spices; serves 4-5 members.

items.name: Vankaya Peethala Pulusu
items.description: 1kg of succulent crabs and brinjals simmered together in a fragrant, tangy coastal tamarind stew.

items.name: Fish Mamidi Pulusu (Rohu)
items.description: 1kg of fresh Rohu fish cooked in a seasonal tangy gravy flavored with raw mango slices.

items.name: Pandugappa Eguru
items.description: 1kg of premium Barramundi (Sea Bass) in a thick gravy, slow-cooked with a rich blend of Andhra chilies.

items.name: Bommidala Pulusu
items.description: 1kg of the famous seasonal fresh-water mud fish served in a highly spiced, traditional tamarind broth.

items.name: Chinta Chiguru Pachi Royyalu
items.description: Fresh prawns stir-fried with tender, young tamarind leaves — a sophisticated seasonal delicacy serving 3-4 members.

items.name: Fish Fry
items.description: 1.5kg of marinated fish steaks coated in spicy red chili rub and shallow-fried until crisp.

items.name: Egg Endu Chapa
items.description: A unique combination featuring boiled eggs and dried fish in a thick, spicy gravy; serves 4-5 members.

items.name: Mutton Mulakkada
items.description: Tender mutton pieces slow-cooked with drumsticks to infuse the gravy with a sweet aroma; serves 4-5 members.

items.name: Dawat-E-Nawab (Serve For 10)

items.name: Family Salan & Rice Feast (Serve for 10)

items.name: Old Hyderabad Boti Platter (Serve for 10)

items.name: Charminar Breakfast Combo 2 (Serve for 10)
